service_list.name: New Build Residential
service_list.brief: Specialising in new home construction roofing with premium Colorbond installations for custom-built homes where quality and precision are paramount.

service_list.name: Commercial New Builds
service_list.brief: Premium commercial roofing for new construction projects with coordinated scheduling, quality materials, and professional site management for builders and developers.

service_list.name: Metal Roof Maintenance & Repairs
service_list.brief: Specialised maintenance for existing metal roofing systems including storm damage response, leak detection, and protective treatments to extend the life of Colorbond roofs.

service_list.name: Premium Guttering
service_list.brief: Complete roofing systems with custom box gutters, architectural fascias, and engineered drainage solutions that complement premium roofing installations.

items: Supplier associations with Velux, Colorbond, Truecore, Apex, and QBCC

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the premium builder-focused positioning, the strong emphasis on new build metal roofing, the QBCC/insurance trust signals, and the supplier credibility from Colorbond, Velux, Truecore, Apex, and QBCC. Improve the site by replacing boilerplate metadata, removing noindex settings before launch, making project proof and quote pathways clearer, adding verifiable licence details, address/service area clarity, testimonials, and stronger service pages. The redesign matters because NBMR is positioned for high-value residential and commercial construction work, so the website needs to look as precise, trustworthy, and builder-ready as the service it sells.

ready_to_build_concerns: No street address found in crawled content.
QBCC licensing is claimed but no licence number was found.
Owner name and team details were not found.
No real customer testimonials were found.
Metadata includes generic web application copy unrelated to the business.
Robots meta includes noindex, which would block search visibility if left in production.
Only 2 crawled URLs were provided, including one JSON asset page, so deeper service/location/project content may be missing.
